author: Brett Allen
content:
I can’t remember when I wrote it, but this has been under the “Objective” section of my resume for most of the past decade:

“I’m a software engineer. It is half discipline and half art. Done right, source code can be beautiful, elegant, efficient, and inspiring. The end product a masterpiece of design, with all it’s components interacting like a well oiled machine. That is what I aspire to create.”

Software is the medium I express my creativity with as much as it is a tool I use to model and understand the world.
